text:
In `pc`, nouns are the entity layer for grounding memory. They are the stable named things that facts, corrections, and guide content hang off. The live purpose is:

1. Capture/project memory finds or derives project nouns.
   [src/nouns.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/src/proactive-context/src/nouns.rs:6) calls them “the stable spine the volatile behavioral facts hang off.” [...] 1. Capture/project memory finds or derives project nouns.
   [src/nouns.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/src/proactive-context/src/nouns.rs:6) calls them “the stable spine the volatile behavioral facts hang off.”
